description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit made primarily of wood with a natural, light brown finish. The structure features three open shelves at the top, divided by a vertical central support, providing ample space for displaying or storing items. Below the shelves, there is a single large drawer with a round metallic knob, offering concealed storage. The base of the unit is supported by four angled legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or glass panels. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a single drawer at the bottom, supported by angled legs and finished in a light brown wood tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, a central vertical divider, and a single drawer with a round knob at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wooden panel and the depth of the unit, with no visible shelves or drawer details.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing the shelves and a plain drawer front without a visible knob.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid wooden panel and the unit's depth.
